name: ORGANOCLICK AB
summary: OrganoClick AB (publ), a material and chemical technology company, develops, produces, and markets fiber-based materials and chemicals in Sweden. It offers OrganoWood, a wooden material that is resistant to fungal decay and fire for construction companies and consumers; OrganoTex, a fluorocarbon-free water repellent additive, which is used as a durable water repellant additive for textile mills, as well as a spray-on or wash-in products by consumers; and OrganoComp, a biodegradable and renewable biocomposite for use in various applications. The company also provides OC-BioBinder, a bio-based and biodegradable binder based on modified biopolymers and natural plant compounds; and OC-aquasil Tex, a water repellent for technical textiles and nonwovens, as well as protects them from water-based soiling, such as stains from red wine, coffee, ketchup, etc. In addition, it offers facade wash, roof wash, and algae and mold removers, as well as wood protection systems, and maintenance and cleaning products under the Biokleen name for houses, properties, cars, and heavy transportation vehicles. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in T√É¬§by, Sweden.
